sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ سَامِي مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً فِي مَجَالِ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Sami je naučio nove vještine u oblasti računarstva.
sentences.translationEn: Sami learned new skills in the field of computers.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ دَوْرَةً تَدْرِيبِيَّةً لِتَطْوِيرِ قُدُرَاتِهِ الْمِهْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pohađao je kurs obuke kako bi razvio svoje profesionalne sposobnosti.
sentences.translationEn: He attended a training course to develop his professional abilities.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، يَمْلِكُ فُرَصًا أَكْبَرَ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى تَرْقِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada ima veće šanse da dobije unapređenje.
sentences.translationEn: Now, he has greater opportunities to get a promotion.
